title: Anvils Resounded
description: A Simple Mod to make Anvils Sound more Accurate
body:
# Anvils Resounded
Anvils resounded is a mod that aims to make anvils sound more accurate. The mod currently only makes it so that when you enchant an item, it will play an enchanting sound instead of a hammering sound.

<video width="560" height="315" controls>
  <source src="https://github.com/snackbag-net/Anvils-Resounded/raw/main/imgdump/showcase.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

---

If you have a feature request, just [open an issue on our GitHub](https://github.com/snackbag-net/Anvils-Resounded). We wont bite :)
